message:
fix(web): rate-limit share link endpoints and stabilize hook refresh callbacks

Share link rate limiting:
- Add shareCreationLimiter (20 req/60s, 10k buckets) to POST /api/share
  for creation endpoint with 429 + Retry-After response on limit breach
- Add checkRateLimit() guard to PUT and DELETE /api/share/[code] for
  update and delete endpoints

Hook refresh stability:
- Wrap refresh callbacks in arrow functions in use-rating, useAllRatings,
  and useLeaderboard hooks to provide stable function identity across
  renders, preventing unnecessary re-renders in consumers that depend on
  refresh in effect dependency arrays

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
